source.task_shape: iOSWorld repository with tasks.json and bootstrap scripts

commands: uv run bench tasks check benchmarks/iosworld-smoke/repo --level runtime-capability --sandbox cua --json

unsupported_reports.reason: iOSWorld tasks require a macOS/iOS Simulator provider mapping

gaps: no runnable iOSWorld slice until a macOS/iOS Simulator provider is available
